headlines.title: Nvidia unveils Cosmos 3 Edge, a world model designed for robots and vision AI agents to perceive and navigate physical environments in real time (Jenny Lee/CNBC)
Apptio co-founders reunite to launch enterprise AI startup Thira with $21M in funding led by Madrona
Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs launch a bioresilience program to leverage AI models for pathogen surveillance, vaccine design, and outbreak response (Madison Mills/Axios)
Munich robotics startup Microagi raises $55m, Germany’s largest ever seed round
Robotics startup Monumental raises $32m backed by Khosla Ventures
Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
Fintech Funding Surges 23% In H1 2026 As Investors Concentrate Their Bets On AI And Financial Infrastructure
Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
Where are YC founders now? OpenAI and Anthropic, mostly
Meta will now notify parents if teens discuss suicide or self-harm with Meta AI and is working on alerts to emergency services for users at risk of self-harm (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)
Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
China And AI Lead Asia’s Startup Funding To Multiyear Peak In Q2
Japan is building a 140MW AI factory for robots, and Nvidia is supplying all of it
EQT-backed Syntetica raises $30m backed by Lululemon
Amazon AGI director says AI agent reliability, not capability, is blocking enterprise deployment at VB Transform 2026
AWS EC2 and AI leader Dave Brown to exit, replaced by Amazon exec and Microsoft vet Dave Treadwell
Yann LeCun launched a new VC fund — then quit. What happened?
Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
'We have maybe 20 months' to rebuild for AI agents, Meta's infrastructure VP tells VB Transform 2026
Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
Beacon Security, which offers an agentic security platform, raised a $13M seed and says it has "tens" of large enterprise customers including Cerebras (Chris Metinko/Axios)
Alpaca, which offers brokerage and financial infrastructure, raised $135M in equity and $300M in debt, following a $150M Series D in January (Bernard Goyder/Bloomberg)
The Billion-Dollar Seed Isn’t The Deal You Think It Is
An F1 aerodynamicist just raised $55m to teach factory robots, using footage of people doing chores
